Query.SQL: SELECT ( SELECT DECODE(COUNT(*),0,'false','true') FROM PAYMENT_SUMMARY PS2 WHERE SUBSTR( PS2.REPORT_ID, 1, 3 ) = 'B/F' AND PS2.ADMIN_COURT_CODE = ${param.adminCourtCode} AND PS2.VALID = 'Y' AND PS2.DCS_DATE = TO_DATE( ${param.dcsDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD' ) ) AS "PS.ACCOUNTING_PERIOD_ENDED", ( SELECT DECODE(COUNT(*),0,'true','false') FROM PAYMENT_SUMMARY PS2 WHERE SUBSTR( PS2.REPORT_ID, 1, 3 ) = 'B/F' AND PS2.ADMIN_COURT_CODE = ${param.adminCourtCode} AND PS2.VALID = 'Y') AS "PS.NO_BROUGHT_FORWARD_ROW" FROM DUAL
